description: This pipeline applies advanced image filtering techniques. The main steps involve applying complex filters to enhance the quality of the images.

df211e35-e21b-4838-96c9-300cbe383df1.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
df211e35-e21b-4838-96c9-300cbe383df1.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

171152f8-bd5c-4928-a708-e30be2f69731.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
171152f8-bd5c-4928-a708-e30be2f69731.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

5bdfe07d-7c7e-4fc2-ac8d-999b8370867e.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
5bdfe07d-7c7e-4fc2-ac8d-999b8370867e.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

08ed20fd-66e4-4b72-87be-caf1bcd7af29.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
08ed20fd-66e4-4b72-87be-caf1bcd7af29.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

41743a52-4f84-40ea-a178-f39a2088d970.description:

89e25c32-1711-4e7c-aaa9-a22806cbf785.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.
